verses.arabicText: ۞ وَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ مِن جُندٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ
verses.translationText: And We did not send down upon his people after him any soldiers from the heaven, nor would We have done so.

verses.arabicText: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَإِذَا هُمْ خَٰمِدُونَ
verses.translationText: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished.

verses.arabicText: يَٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ ۚ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.translationText: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him.

verses.arabicText: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.translationText: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return?

verses.arabicText: وَإِن كُلٌّۭ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌۭ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
verses.translationText: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us.

verses.arabicText: وَءَايَةٌۭ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنَٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّۭا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ
verses.translationText: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat.

verses.arabicText: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّٰتٍۢ مِّن نَّخِيلٍۢ وَأَعْنَٰبٍۢ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْعُيُونِ
verses.translationText: And We placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs -

verses.arabicText: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.translationText: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful?

verses.arabicText: سُبْحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.translationText: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.

verses.arabicText: وَءَايَةٌۭ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ
verses.translationText: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it [the light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness.

verses.arabicText: وَٱلشَّمْسُ تَجْرِى لِمُسْتَقَرٍّۢ لَّهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ
verses.translationText: And the sun runs [on course] toward its stopping point. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.

verses.arabicText: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
verses.translationText: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk.

verses.arabicText: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ وَكُلٌّۭ فِى فَلَكٍۢ يَسْبَحُونَ
verses.translationText: It is not allowable for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.
